title: Require Operation Contract File Shape
forbids: domain operation contract files missing defineOp ownership or importing contract envelopes from config bags, recipes, stages, sibling operation contracts, or runtime operation constructors
why: Operation contracts are the schema boundary for domain operations. Inputs, outputs, and strategy envelopes must live at the contract definition site, with reusable primitives pulled from named domain model owners instead of generic config bags. This rule is advisory until the known current red rows are burned down, then it should be promoted to enforced with an empty baseline.
remediate: Inline operation input/output/strategy envelopes into the owning contract.ts, move reusable primitives to model/schemas, move reusable policy to model/policy, and keep createOp/createStage usage outside contract files.
message: Operation contract files must own the operation contract shape.
